Evidence: /postnuke/html/My_eGallery/public/displayCategory.php: My_eGallery prior to 3.1.1.g are vulnerable to a remote execution bug via SQL command injection. displayCategory.php calls imageFunctions.php without checking URL/location arguments. See: http://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2006-6795
Remediation: Apply security patches and update server configuration.
